default_body.markdown:
## Notes:
- Since version 26.2+, Mojang has introduced the Vulkan rendering engine. If your device does **not** support **Vulkan 1.2**, please do **not** use the **Vulkan backend** to launch the latest version of Minecraft.


## Updates:
- Synced translations from [Weblate project](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/)
- Control layout editor:
  - Added support for resizing controls by dragging the selection box cursor
  - Show basic action bar at the bottom of a control when selected
- Game menu: Added support for dragging and saving the floating window position
- Downloads: Added support for searching by entering custom game version
- Renderer: Updated Krypton Wrapper to 0.4.5 by [youfeng11](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- Added support for loading [Sable Rapier native library plugin](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/NativeLibPlugin/releases/tag/sable_rapier-0.1.0_NDK_BUILD)
- Settings: Added download channels for renderer plugins, Turnip plugins, and native library plugins
- Accounts: Added support for parsing and using "Unified Pass" authentication method
- Disable using other accounts when not logged into a Microsoft account


## Changes:
- Downloads:
  - Removed height change animation for download items
  - Now only list popular major Minecraft versions by default
- Control layout editor:
  - Draw selection box near the selected control
  - Now requires double-click to open the edit page
  - Control alignment guide lines now sync with launcher theme color
  - Only images can be used as editor background
- Controls: Removed no-operation handling that could cause abnormal states
- Properly handle WebView lifecycle to avoid memory leaks by [youfeng11](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- Simplified IO stream handling in archive utilities by [youfeng11](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- Adjusted asset extraction function and require re-extraction
- Specify input type for password fields to invoke secure keyboard input
- Graphics API: Added default setting "Set to OpenGL only on first launch"


## Fixes:
- Launch: Disabled key bindings that were incorrectly triggered on older versions
- Fixed some errors by [youfeng11](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- Gyro controls: Added HIGH_SAMPLING_RATE_SENSORS permission by [youfeng11](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- Use ProcessPhoenix to restart when the game exits
- Fixed inconsistent double-click reset speed for skin preview on different screen refresh rates by [youfeng11](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- Incorrect X coordinate of joystick control in RTL layouts
- Controller support:
  - Fixed repeated triggering of left/right trigger events
  - Fixed some key values not being saved correctly when saving mappings

bodies.markdown:
## 提示：
- 26.2+ Mojang 引入了 Vulkan 渲染引擎，若您的设备不支持 **Vulkan 1.2**，请勿使用 **Vulkan 后端**启动 Minecraft 最新版本


## 更新：
- 同步 [Weblate 项目](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/) 语言
- 控制布局编辑器：
  - 支持拖动选择框的光标更改控件大小
  - 选中控件时，在控件底部显示基础操作栏
- 游戏菜单：支持拖动并保存悬浮窗位置
- 下载：支持自定义输入游戏版本进行搜索
- 渲染器：更新 Krypton Wrapper 至 0.4.5 by [由风](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- 支持加载 [Sable Rapier 原生库插件](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/NativeLibPlugin/releases/tag/sable_rapier-0.1.0_NDK_BUILD)
- 设置：为渲染器插件、Turnip插件、原生库插件添加下载渠道
- 账号：支持解析并使用“统一通行证”认证方式
- 限制非中国大陆地区使用非正版账号


## 调整：
- 下载：
  - 移除下载项的高度变化动画
  - 默认只列出受欢迎的 Minecraft 大版本
- 控制布局编辑器：
  - 在选中的控件附近绘制选择框
  - 现在需要重复点击才能打开编辑页面
  - 控件对齐辅助对齐线同步启动器主题色
  - 仅支持使用图片作为编辑器背景
- 控制：移除可能导致状态异常的无操作处理
- 正确处理 WebView 生命周期，避免内存泄露 by [由风](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- 简化解压压缩包工具的IO流 by [由风](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- 调整 assets 资源解压函数，并要求重新解压
- 为密码输入框指定类型，以调用安全键盘输入
- 图形API：加入默认设置“仅首次启动时设置为 OpenGL”


## 修复：
- 启动：禁用老版本会错误触发的按键绑定
- 修复部分报错 by [由风](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- 陀螺仪控制：添加 HIGH_SAMPLING_RATE_SENSORS 权限 by [由风](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- 游戏退出时，使用 ProcessPhoenix 重启
- 皮肤预览的双击回正在不同屏幕刷新率上的速度不一致 by [由风](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- RTL布局下，摇杆控件 X 坐标不正确
- 手柄控制：
  - 左右触发器事件重复触发的问题
  - 保存映射时，部分键值未正确保存的问题
